get_weather.description: Get the current weather for a city. Use this when the user asks about weather conditions, temperature, or forecasts.

city.description: City name, e.g. 'Minneapolis' or 'London'. Prefer well-known city names over ambiguous ones.

convert_temperature.description: Convert a temperature between Celsius and Fahrenheit. Use when the user asks to convert between units.

value.description: The numeric temperature value to convert.

from_unit.description: The source unit — 'C' for Celsius or 'F' for Fahrenheit.

to_unit.description: The target unit — 'C' for Celsius or 'F' for Fahrenheit.
